programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: A friendly retired couple delights a family with young children when they move in next door. Then the new neighbors' dog attacks the children's mother, setting off a vicious conflict that ends in two shocking murders.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: After a violent altercation with his father, a young man flees the police and runs into the woods, sending the team on a manhunt.

programme.title: Forensic Factor
programme.desc: Sixteen years after a college student is found raped and strangled on a buffalo bike path, DNA technology and other clues help catch the killer.

On Valentine's Day, a surprise marriage proposal goes awry with dangerous consequences; Athena attempts to help a desperate woman; Bobby and Chimney pull holiday duty; Abby and Buck go on their first official date.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.desc: A full moon keeps the crew busy with crazy calls; Athena investigates a potential home invasion; Abby helps investigate a caller's murder; Bobby and Buck have their hands full at a yoga studio for pregnant women; Hen's past may become her future.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.desc: Bobby gets a surprising phone call from his doctor after donating at Chimney's blood drive; Athena confronts Michael after having a heart-to-heart with their kids.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.desc: The first responders race to help a homeless man crushed in a garbage truck, a mother and son in a crashed elevator, and extreme hoarders trapped in their house; Athena starts dating; the situation with Abby's mother tests her relationship with Buck.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.desc: The first responders take calls involving an unusual domestic disturbance, a "death" at a psychic's place, and a motorcycle crash; Bobby dips his toes into the dating pool; Abby walks down memory lane, and Buck is confronted by his past actions.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.desc: On one of the hottest days of the year, the first responders must deal with harrowing incidents all around the city; Buck gets a surprise visit from his sister; Athena questions her relationship with Bobby; Buck worries about a handsome new hire.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Sullivan's Crossing
programme.desc: After learning the truth, Maggie struggles to reconcile her unresolved feelings for Liam while helping Cal look for Ben and Tracy.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: A massive earthquake rocks Los Angeles; the first responders rush to rescue victims from a crumbling high-rise hotel; Athena must deal with wreckage from a collapsed freeway overpass; Maddie faces her first crisis as a 911 dispatcher.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Sullivan's Crossing
programme.desc: After learning the truth, Maggie struggles to reconcile her unresolved feelings for Liam while helping Cal look for Ben and Tracy.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: On Valentine's Day, a surprise marriage proposal goes awry with dangerous consequences; Athena attempts to help a desperate woman; Bobby and Chimney pull holiday duty; Abby and Buck go on their first official date.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: A five-year relationship between neighbors falls apart when one borrows the other's lawnmower and supposedly returns it broken; camaraderie morphs into rage, threats, and physical violence until a bloody murder devastates the community.

programme.title: Forensic Factor
programme.desc: A Texas playboy is murdered and police uncover x-rated photos, shocking videos and an object hidden inside the victim's body.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: A member of the team is caught in the wrong place at the wrong time when a young man holds a courtroom hostage in an attempt to clear his name for a murder he didn't commit.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: A five-year relationship between neighbors falls apart when one borrows the other's lawnmower and supposedly returns it broken; camaraderie morphs into rage, threats, and physical violence until a bloody murder devastates the community.

programme.title: Forensic Factor
programme.desc: A Texas playboy is murdered and police uncover x-rated photos, shocking videos and an object hidden inside the victim's body.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: A member of the team is caught in the wrong place at the wrong time when a young man holds a courtroom hostage in an attempt to clear his name for a murder he didn't commit.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: A five-year relationship between neighbors falls apart when one borrows the other's lawnmower and supposedly returns it broken; camaraderie morphs into rage, threats, and physical violence until a bloody murder devastates the community.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: A member of the team is caught in the wrong place at the wrong time when a young man holds a courtroom hostage in an attempt to clear his name for a murder he didn't commit.

programme.title: Forensic Factor
programme.desc: A Texas playboy is murdered and police uncover x-rated photos, shocking videos and an object hidden inside the victim's body.

programme.title: Chicago Med
programme.desc: Dr. Halstead's world is thrown into turmoil when a former patient resurfaces; April has a secret she considers confessing to Ethan; Dr. Charles tries to maintain his focus during a difficult time.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Chicago Med
programme.desc: After a major accident at O'Hare International Airport, the E.D. is concerned one of their own is in mortal danger; Will's proposal for a safe injection site goes to the board for consideration; Natalie and Goodwin become concerned for Gwen.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Chicago Med
programme.desc: The team deals with the aftermath of a school bus crash; Dr. Charles worries Dr. Halstead is putting his medical license in jeopardy; Maggie helps a friend in need.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Chicago Med
programme.desc: Two brothers in critical condition are rushed into the hospital by their parents, leaving Dr. Choi, April and Dr. Charles to piece together what actually transpired; Dr. Manning becomes suspicious of a new mother entering the E.D.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Chicago Med
programme.desc: Dr. Manning and Dr. Marcel disagree over an abusive husband; Dr. Halstead struggles with ethics and his decision to work at the safe injection site; Dr. Charles and Elsa reveal a misdiagnosis that may change a family's life.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Chicago Med
programme.desc: Dr. Charles and Dr. Manning treat a patient who is fully invested in pretending to be someone other than himself; Noah doubts his abilities as a doctor; Dr. Marcel and Dr. Choi face a tough ethical decision; Dr. Halstead puts his faith in an addict.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Chicago Med
programme.desc: A convicted murderer's escape hits close to home when several team members end up in danger; Dr. Charles and Dr. Halstead clash over patient treatment plans; Dr. Choi and April discover the truth about a patient's scam; Maggie receives good news.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Crime Scene Investigators
programme.desc: Louisiana investigators find Andrew Jasmine in front of his home video game console, riddled with bullet holes; and with shell casings from two different firearms, the crime scene bears the hallmarks of a criminal conspiracy.

programme.title: Chicago Med
programme.desc: After a major accident at O'Hare International Airport, the E.D. is concerned one of their own is in mortal danger; Will's proposal for a safe injection site goes to the board for consideration; Natalie and Goodwin become concerned for Gwen.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Crime Scene Investigators
programme.desc: Louisiana investigators find Andrew Jasmine in front of his home video game console, riddled with bullet holes; and with shell casings from two different firearms, the crime scene bears the hallmarks of a criminal conspiracy.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: A retired couple's golden years shatter when a troubled Army veteran moves in next door and makes their lives hell with his appalling behavior; they declare war, fighting vicious battles until one of these neighbors turns up dead.

programme.title: Forensic Factor
programme.desc: Phoenix police are faced with a unique serial killer team who get their thrills stalking and shooting innocent people at night.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Jules puts her negotiating skills to the test when the unit responds to a kidnapping, only to find that there are actually two victims.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: A retired couple's golden years shatter when a troubled Army veteran moves in next door and makes their lives hell with his appalling behavior; they declare war, fighting vicious battles until one of these neighbors turns up dead.

programme.title: Forensic Factor
programme.desc: Phoenix police are faced with a unique serial killer team who get their thrills stalking and shooting innocent people at night.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Jules puts her negotiating skills to the test when the unit responds to a kidnapping, only to find that there are actually two victims.

programme.desc: A retired couple's golden years shatter when a troubled Army veteran moves in next door and makes their lives hell with his appalling behavior; they declare war, fighting vicious battles until one of these neighbors turns up dead.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Jules puts her negotiating skills to the test when the unit responds to a kidnapping, only to find that there are actually two victims.

programme.title: Forensic Factor
programme.desc: Phoenix police are faced with a unique serial killer team who get their thrills stalking and shooting innocent people at night.
